evals.expected_output: R4 passes (back button line 4 is compliant). Warning about missing 'error' computed property (R7 partial). R1, R2, R3, R5, R6 all pass.

assertions.name: correctly_passes_R4
assertions.description: Report correctly identifies R4 as passing — back button at line 4 has '← Back' text, correct classes, and $router.back()

assertions.name: detects_R7_warning
assertions.description: Report flags missing 'error' computed property — either as a violation or warning under R7

assertions.name: passes_R1_R2_R3
assertions.description: R1 (Options API), R2 (section order), and R3 (no Firebase) are explicitly marked passing

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Output includes a summary section or verdict at the end

evals.prompt: Check src/stores/orders.js and src/views/admin/AdminOrders.vue for compliance with project rules
evals.expected_output: R3 passes for AdminOrders.vue. R7 violations in orders.js (async actions missing loading/error). R8 violation for hardcoded status strings. R3 passes.

assertions.name: no_firebase_in_component
assertions.description: R3 passes for AdminOrders.vue — no Firebase direct import violations cited

assertions.name: detects_R7_loading_error_gap
assertions.description: Report flags that some async actions in orders.js do not set loading/error state (R7 violation)

assertions.name: detects_R8_status_constants
assertions.description: Report flags hardcoded 'pending'/'shipped' status strings as R8 violation (should be in src/constants/)

evals.expected_output: R5 violation for raw CSS .no-scrollbar in style block. All other rules pass. Report covers all 8 rules.

assertions.name: detects_R5_css_violation
assertions.description: Report flags raw CSS in <style> block (.no-scrollbar or webkit-scrollbar) as an R5 violation

assertions.name: passes_R1_R2_R3_R6_R7_R8
assertions.description: No violations for R1, R2, R3, R6, R7, R8 in HomeView.vue

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Output includes a '## Review Summary' or summary verdict section
